title: WBD Scenario Planning and Multi-Agent Engine
subtitle: Start with a simple campaign idea and let the system recommend the best converged scenario.
narrative: This demo now starts from a natural-language campaign prompt, maps it to synthetic WBD first-party viewer data, recommends a scenario, and then runs a hierarchical multi-agent workflow across planning, yield, booking, trafficking, operations, and measurement.

defaults.agentStyle: Use clear, concise WBD business language. Explain the data signal behind each decision and surface risks when they matter.

demos.title: Organic Toddler Snacks
demos.body: Natural-language brief for a young-family product that should pull the recommendation toward streaming-led household reach.
demos.problem: I have $50K for organic toddler snacks and I want to reach U.S. parents of toddlers who are likely to buy healthier snacks.

plan.systemInstruction: Use the synthetic WBD viewer dataset and Olli graph to find young-parent households, highlight streaming-heavy behavior, and document the strongest audience and platform signals.
plan.initialTask: Resolve the highest-fit parent-of-toddler audience and explain why the selected audience should lean toward Max, discovery+, or linear support.

plan.systemInstruction: Build a converged proposal that reflects the audience evidence, the recommended scenario, and the strongest WBD networks for this product without forcing a fixed channel split.
plan.initialTask: Turn the recommended scenario into a converged plan with clear network, budget, impression, and pricing logic.

plan.systemInstruction: Check the selected product, audience, and markets against the synthetic compliance rulebook and suggest safer alternatives only if the plan needs them.
plan.initialTask: Validate the proposal, explain any compliance constraints, and keep the execution package launch-ready.

plan.systemInstruction: Simulate in-flight delivery, look for pacing or signal risk, and use the scenario reserve to protect delivery and return on investment if one channel underdelivers.
plan.initialTask: Run the in-flight simulation, trigger make-good logic if needed, and report the before-and-after result.

handoffs.label: Passing Converged Media Plan (12 items) -> Agent 3

demos.title: Insurance Renewal Push
demos.body: Older-skewing category that should demonstrate why a linear-heavier scenario can be the smarter recommendation.
demos.problem: I have $90K to promote auto and home insurance renewal offers in the U.S. and I want to reach adults 35 plus who are shopping for better coverage.

demos.title: New Vehicle Launch
demos.body: Auto-intender template designed to sit closer to the middle and show how the system balances sports, streaming, and household reach.
demos.problem: I have $65K to launch a new SUV in the U.S. and I want to reach people who are actively researching their next vehicle.

demos.title: Streaming Drama Premiere
demos.body: Entertainment-focused template that should bias toward younger streaming-heavy viewers and premium digital inventory.
demos.problem: I have $85K to promote a new streaming drama premiere and I want to build buzz with younger binge-watchers across the U.S.

demos.title: Financial Services Compliance Case
demos.body: Higher-regulation template that shows how the recommendation still works while the compliance layer tightens the path.
demos.problem: I have $120K for a financial services campaign across the U.S. and Germany, and I need to reach affluent adults while staying inside compliance guardrails.

demos.title: Sports Finals Burst
demos.body: Short-window, high-volatility brief meant to stress pacing, make-good logic, and the hierarchy under pressure.
demos.problem: I have $70K for a sports finals campaign and I want to maximize unique household reach fast without losing control if live delivery slips.
